stepTitle: Step 1 — Define game loop, controls, and level scope
stepDescription: Read PLAN.md, confirm dependencies, and prepare grouped Code Mode execution.

stepTitle: Step 2 — Build the playable canvas and scene shell
stepDescription: Create the app entry, shared content, base layout, and structural files before feature work.

stepTitle: Step 3 — Implement player movement, collisions, and scoring
stepDescription: Generate the main product sections as one grouped implementation pass, with mini code boxes per file.

stepTitle: Step 4 — Add menus, feedback, and restart flow
stepDescription: Connect CTAs, forms, menus, tabs, local/demo state, and other working interactions across files.

stepTitle: Step 5 — Polish motion, responsiveness, and visual depth
stepDescription: Revisit important files for motion, hover states, mobile layout, and visual consistency.
Run available checks, start live preview, and report exact blockers instead of faking readiness.
